reason: The historical profile allocation is overwhelmingly medium (16301/16304). One deep and two short observations cannot establish a budget-to-pressure correlation, and the records are not matched on the same spectral state.

semantic_trickle_source_verification.interpretation: The stable-core semantic trickle scale is constant with respect to entropy in current source. This verifies the requested independence check but does not establish that high-entropy noise originates internally.

next_trial.design: Replay one fixed, redacted spectral summary and fixed prompt assembly under short, medium, and deep diagnostic token profiles; compare only read-only prompt pressure and texture classifications. Any live generation or pressure response comparison remains separately authorized.
